name: usb_c_power_sink_fixture_v1
description: Starter proof-pack manifest for the USB-C power sink board-family benchmark fixture.

checks.name: requirements-present
checks.description: Requirements contract exists for the USB-C power sink board-family fixture.

checks.name: golden-kicad-present
checks.description: Golden KiCad fixture files are present and hashable.

checks.name: manufacturing-export-manifest-present
checks.description: Manufacturing export bundle manifest is present and explicitly marked as non-fabrication evidence.

check_records.name: fixture-coverage
check_records.summary: Required starter fixture artifacts are committed for usb_c_power_sink. This is coverage evidence only.

author: ZapTrace Core Team
limitations: Starter fixture coverage does not prove USB-C compliance, USB-IF certification, safety approval, electrical correctness, or manufacturability.
KiCad files in this fixture are hash fixtures for release workflow coverage, not a fabrication-ready board.
